location_contract.location_method: Stage 1 freezes file-level provenance only for the verification witness; fragment-level page tracing is deferred to stage 3 witness-diff work.

source_pages.label: Humdrum k516f canonical digital source
source_pages.purpose: Stage 2 mother-score freeze source aligned to the Rellstab ca.1790 witness and verified against the printed Walzer oder Schleifer tradition.

notes: Stage 1 freezes provenance and locating contracts without claiming that mother_score.musicxml or mother_score.mei are already diplomatic transcriptions.
The canonical witness is page-addressable through the Staatsbibliothek zu Berlin IIIF manifest; the verification witness is only frozen at the file level in this stage.
Stage 2 freezes the mother-score layer from the canonical Humdrum source.
Stage 3 reconciles rules.json and mozart_16x11_table.json against the canonical mother score while keeping Simrock 1793 at file-level witness-diff scope.
